title: Krasnodar、Krasnodar Krai — 生活成本、住房與搬遷指南 [2026]
description: Krasnodar、Krasnodar Krai的完整指南：生活成本、房價、社區、遠程工作準備情況和搬遷建議。
content:
概述

Krasnodar是Krasnodar Krai的一個城市，人口約950,000。The capital of the Kuban region, a rapidly growing southern city with a warm climate, known as the gateway to the Black Sea resorts.

Last updated: July 19, 2026
